Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (Corinneâs Quest and the protection of children)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (Corinneâs Quest and the protection of children)

Stages.StageText: Reprinted as amended by the Standing Committee on Justice and Human Rights as a working copy for the use of the House of Commons at Report Stage and as reported to the House on MayÂ 8, 2024

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Criminal Code to repeal a provision that authorizes the correction of a child by force if certain criteria are met.
His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Section 43 of the Criminal Code is repealed.
This Act comes into force on the 30th day after the day on which it receives royal assent.
